signals.headline: RLUSD Stablecoin Full-Scale Rollout Confirmed on XRPL & Ethereum | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
RLUSD Stablecoin Full-Scale Rollout Confirmed on XRPL & Ethereum | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Ripple USD (RLUSD) has officially launched across the XRP Ledger and Ethereum as of April 18, 2026, driving massive capital influx and record XRPL transaction volume amid resolved SEC battle and nearing XRP ETF approvals.[1]

signals.headline: SEC Legal Battle Officially Resolved | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
SEC Legal Battle Officially Resolved | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Long-standing SEC case against Ripple is confirmed closed, boosting institutional adoption, XRP ETF final-stage approvals, and central bank integration of Ripple payments.[1]

signals.headline: Rakuten Wallet Live on XRP Rails | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Rakuten Wallet Live on XRP Rails | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Rakuten Wallet launched April 15, 2026, enabling XRP payments and coinciding with XRP's first 2026 breach above $1.50 (intraday high $1.51094 on April 17), backed by $224M spot ETF inflows signaling institutional shift over retail futures.[3]

signals.headline: Nasdaq Round-the-Clock Trading by June 30
signals.raw:
Nasdaq Round-the-Clock Trading by June 30? | NO | HIGH confidence**  
Polymarket's top trending market shows "Nasdaq round-the-clock trading by June 30?" at 22% YES odds with $43.9K volume, signaling traders' low conviction in approval soon; no whale bets or X posts noted in real-time data[1].
